common_object_types.name: WorkOrder
common_object_types.description: Production or maintenance work to be performed

common_object_types.name: Equipment
common_object_types.description: Physical assets that produce or support production

common_object_types.name: QualityInspection
common_object_types.description: Quality check on materials or products

common_object_types.name: Inventory
common_object_types.description: Stock levels of materials and products

common_relationships: WorkOrder → Equipment (many_to_one): work order services equipment
PurchaseOrder → Supplier (many_to_one): order placed with supplier
